The classification of Paraprasophyllum macrostachyum is as follows: its kingdom is Plantae, its phylum is Magnoliophyta, its class is Liliopsida, its order is Asparagales, and its family is Orchidaceae. It is further classified as subfamily Orchidoideae, tribe Diurideae, and subtribe Caladeniinae. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
